import click
import httpx


@click.command()
@click.option("--user-id", required=True)
def fetch_user(user_id):
    client = httpx.Client(base_url="https://api.example.com", timeout=30)
    response = client.get(f"/users/{user_id}")
    click.echo(response.json())
    client.close()


@click.command()
@click.option("--repo", required=True)
def check_repo(repo):
    client = httpx.Client(base_url="https://api.github.com", timeout=30)
    response = client.get(f"/repos/{repo}")
    click.echo(response.status_code)
    client.close()


@click.command()
@click.option("--query", required=True)
def search(query):
    client = httpx.Client(base_url="https://search.example.com", timeout=30)
    response = client.get("/search", params={"q": query})
    results = response.json()
    for item in results["hits"]:
        click.echo(item["title"])
    client.close()
